title: ATO Role Definition
description: Schema for Agent Team Orchestrator role definitions

id.description: Unique identifier for the role (lowercase, hyphen-separated)

description.description: Detailed description of the role's responsibilities

expertise.description: List of specialized skills and expertise areas

tools.description: List of available tools this role can use

system_prompt.description: System prompt template. Supports {{context}} placeholder for dynamic context injection.

format.description: Output format (e.g., markdown, openapi, json, code)

deliverables.description: List of expected output formats and descriptions

model_preferences.description: Optional model configuration overrides for this role
